channel.title: +2020s on ज्योतिषम् py
channel.description: Recent content in +2020s on ज्योतिषम् py

item.description: 00 Intro Related files ics Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-tropical, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH 2020-01 2020-01-01 पौषः-10-06,कुम्भः-पूर्वप्रोष्ठपदा🌛🌌◢◣धनुः-पूर्वाषाढा-09-17🌌🌞◢◣सहस्यः-10-11🪐🌞बुधः Indian civil date: 1941-10-11, Islamic: 1441-05-05 Jumādā al-ʾAwwal/ʾŪlā संवत्सरः - विकारी वर्षसङ्ख्या 🌛- शकाब्दः 1941, विक्रमाब्दः 2076, कलियुगे 5120 🪐🌞ऋतुमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः उत्तरायणम् 🌌🌞सौरमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः दक्षिणायनम् 🌛चान्द्रमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः पौषः खचक्रस्थितिः |🌞-🌛|तिथिः — शुक्ल-षष्ठी►18:27; शुक्ल-सप्तमी► 🌌🌛नक्षत्रम् — पूर्वप्रोष्ठपदा►28:20*; उत्तरप्रोष्ठपदा► (मीनः) 🌌🌞सौर-नक्षत्रम् — पूर्वाषाढा► 🌛+🌞योगः — व्यतीपातः►21:45; वरीयान्► २|🌛-🌞|करणम् — तैतिलः►18:27; गरः► 🌌🌛- चन्द्राष्टम-राशिः—सिंहः 🌞-🪐 मूढग्रहाः - बुधः (5.

item.title: 2020 Summary
item.description: Intro Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-tropical, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH Table

00 Intro Related files ics Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-tropical, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH 2021-01 2021-01-01 मार्गशीर्षः-09-17,कर्कटः-पुष्यः🌛🌌◢◣धनुः-पूर्वाषाढा-09-17🌌🌞◢◣सहस्यः-10-12🪐🌞शुक्रः Indian civil date: 1942-10-11, Islamic: 1442-05-17 Jumādā al-ʾAwwal/ʾŪlā संवत्सरः - शार्वरी वर्षसङ्ख्या 🌛- शकाब्दः 1942, विक्रमाब्दः 2077, कलियुगे 5121 🪐🌞ऋतुमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः उत्तरायणम् 🌌🌞सौरमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः दक्षिणायनम् 🌛चान्द्रमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः मार्गशीर्षः खचक्रस्थितिः |🌞-🌛|तिथिः — कृष्ण-द्वितीया►09:33; कृष्ण-तृतीया► 🌌🌛नक्षत्रम् — पुष्यः►20:13; आश्रेषा► (कर्कटः) 🌌🌞सौर-नक्षत्रम् — पूर्वाषाढा► 🌛+🌞योगः — वैधृतिः►13:33; विष्कम्भः► २|🌛-🌞|करणम् — गरः►09:33; वणिजः►21:25; विष्टिः► 🌌🌛- चन्द्राष्टम-राशिः—धनुः 🌞-🪐 मूढग्रहाः - बुधः (-6.

item.title: 2021 Summary
item.description: Intro Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-tropical, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH Table

00 Intro Related files ics Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/general, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH 2022-01 2022-01-01 मार्गशीर्षः-09-28 , वृश्चिकः-ज्येष्ठा🌛🌌 , धनुः-पूर्वाषाढा-09-17🌞🌌 , सहस्यः-10-11🌞🪐 , शनिः Indian civil date: 1943-10-11, Islamic: 1443-05-27 Jumādā al-ʾAwwal/ʾŪlā, 🌌🌞: सं- धनुः, तं- मार्गऴि, म- धनु, प- पोह, अ- पोह संवत्सरः - प्लवः वर्षसङ्ख्या 🌛- शकाब्दः 1943, विक्रमाब्दः 2078, कलियुगे 5122 🪐🌞ऋतुमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः उत्तरायणम् 🌌🌞सौरमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः दक्षिणायनम् 🌛चान्द्रमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः मार्गशीर्षः खचक्रस्थितिः |🌞-🌛|तिथिः — कृष्ण-त्रयोदशी►07:17; कृष्ण-चतुर्दशी►27:42*; अमावास्या► 🌌🌛नक्षत्रम् — ज्येष्ठा►19:15; मूला► (धनुः) 🌌🌞सौर-नक्षत्रम् — पूर्वाषाढा► राशि-मासः — मार्गशीर्षः► 🌛+🌞योगः — गण्डः►13:51; वृद्धिः► २|🌛-🌞|करणम् — वणिजः►07:17; विष्टिः►17:30; शकुनिः►27:42*; चतुष्पात्► 🌌🌛- चन्द्राष्टम-राशिः—वृषभः 🌞-🪐 अमूढग्रहाः - बुधः (-17.

item.title: 2022 Summary
item.description: Intro Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-tropical, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH Table

item.title: 2023 Summary (चि॰)
item.description: Intro Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = true fest_repos_excluded_patterns = [ ".*kAnchI.*", ".*mAdhva.*", ".*smArta-misc.*", ".*zRGgErI.*", ".*nAyanmAr.*", ".*ALvAr.*", ".*sangIta-kRt.*", ".*temples.*",] julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" prefer_eight_fold_day_division = true jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/luno-tropical/smArta, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH Table

item.title: 2023(चि॰)
item.description: 00 Intro Related files ics Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = true prefer_eight_fold_day_division = true julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" fest_repos_excluded_patterns = [ ".*kAnchI.*", ".*mAdhva.*", ".*smArta-misc.*", ".*zRGgErI.*", ".*nAyanmAr.*", ".*ALvAr.*", ".*sangIta-kRt.*", ".*temples.*",] jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/luno-tropical/smArta, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH 2023-01 2023-01-01 (चि॰)

item.title: 2024 Summary (चि॰)
item.description: Intro Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = true fest_repos_excluded_patterns = [ ".*kAnchI.*", ".*mAdhva.*", ".*smArta-misc.*", ".*zRGgErI.*", ".*nAyanmAr.*", ".*ALvAr.*", ".*sangIta-kRt.*", ".*temples.*",] julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" prefer_eight_fold_day_division = true jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/Apastamba_seasonal, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/nakta-vrata-yoga, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/luno-tropical/smArta, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH, time_focus/kalpAdiH, time_focus/adhyayana, time_focus/manvAdiH Table

item.title: 2024(चि॰)
item.description: 00 Intro Related files ics Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (सहकार-नगरम्, कल्याणपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = true prefer_eight_fold_day_division = true julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" fest_repos_excluded_patterns = [ ".*kAnchI.*", ".*mAdhva.*", ".*smArta-misc.*", ".*zRGgErI.*", ".*nAyanmAr.*", ".*ALvAr.*", ".*sangIta-kRt.*", ".*temples.*",] jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/Apastamba_seasonal, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/nakta-vrata-yoga, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/luno-tropical/smArta, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH, time_focus/kalpAdiH, time_focus/adhyayana, time_focus/manvAdiH 2024-01 2024-01-01 (चि॰)
